events: 50 hunters are eaten by the Librarian's tentacle monster for touching books recklessly
Death King organizes 250 hunters into genre-based groups to evaluate Apocalypses
Character windows reveal true preferences - Witch secretly loves romance novels
Venomous Snake is revealed to be a light novel fan sitting in martial arts group
cause_effect: Death King uses his 3rd rank authority to command the hunters
The Librarian only allows safe interaction with Apocalypse books when his powers are inactive
Character windows reveal the gap between stated and true preferences among hunters
chapters.notes: The Great Library contains 683 discontinued Apocalypses. Hunters must choose one to save for their 22nd floor. The Witch is embarrassed about liking romance. The Heretic Questioner knows Sherlock Holmes and joins the Fairy Tale group.

events: Hunters read through hundreds of Apocalypse books
Alchemist reveals she received her Title because Death King used her elixir to save the world
Sword Saint recommends 'Chronicles of Heavenly Demon' (Murim world) for martial arts skills
Shiny senses her sister sword fragment in the Murim world Apocalypse
Heretic Questioner receives a dark fairy tale book from Venomous Snake
cause_effect: The Alchemist's Title 'Alchemist' was earned through Death King's indirect actions
Shiny's sensing of her sister sword determines the next destination
Sword Saint's recommendation leads the team to choose the Murim Apocalypse
chapters.notes: The Chronicles of Heavenly Demon is a B-Class Martial Arts Apocalypse. The world ends due to an unidentified epidemic. Player limit is 2-4 people.

events: Death King stabs himself with the Holy Sword to trigger trauma and learn about Lefanta Aegim
Lefanta Aegim is revealed as the 'Constellation Killer' who hunted hundreds of Constellations
Bae Hu-ryeong knew Lefanta Aegim from the 50th floor
Team for Chronicles of Heavenly Demon finalized: Death King, Sword Saint, Medicine King, Alchemist
skills: I Want To Become Just Like You (death-based skill copying)
Returner's Clockwork Watch (mentioned - Flame Emperor's skill)
deaths: Death King (suicide by Holy Sword to see trauma)
loops: Death King loops back 24 hours after viewing Lefanta Aegim's trauma
cause_effect: Death King learns Lefanta Aegim is hostile to Constellations and will be an enemy on the 50th floor
The trauma reveals Lefanta sealed the Goddess of Protection despite her helping him
Death King decides to be cautious before entering the Murim world
chapters.notes: Lefanta Aegim established the Aegim Empire and split/sealed the Goddess of Protection into five swords. He is extremely dangerous.

events: Sword Saint questions bringing Alchemist to dangerous Apocalypse
Medicine King insults Alchemist as a 'greenhorn'
Death King proposes elixir-making competition between Medicine King and Alchemist
Medicine King produces Unique Recovery Potion
Alchemist produces Quasi-Myth 'Soma Strawberry' that can graft severed limbs
cause_effect: Alchemist's vastly superior product proves Death King's judgment correct
Medicine King loses face and becomes resentful
Count tries to sign exclusive contract with Alchemist
chapters.notes: The betting odds were 1.08 to 47 in favor of Medicine King. The Crusader bet on Alchemist and won big.

events: Medicine King repeatedly loses to Alchemist, then concedes
Venomous Snake's guild members push him to join the expedition
Sword Saint yields spot to Venomous Snake after Crusader's mediation
Team enters 'Chronicles of Heavenly Demon' Apocalypse
They arrive 10 days before the world's destruction
locations: Chronicles of Heavenly Demon Apocalypse (Murim world)
cause_effect: Crusader's mediation and mention of financial/pride concerns convinces Sword Saint to step back
Venomous Snake actually doesn't want to go but is pressured by his disciples
The librarian transports them to the Murim world 10 days before destruction
chapters.notes: Final team: Death King, Venomous Snake, Medicine King, Alchemist. The Apocalypse has a 2-4 player limit. If they die inside, they die in reality.

events: Team arrives in snowy Murim world
They discover hundreds of frozen human corpses standing upright
Zombies awaken when dark clouds cover the sun and attack
Death King uses Shiny's light to repel the zombies
Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord are found fighting with wooden sticks
cause_effect: Sunlight stops zombie movement; darkness triggers awakening
The 'unidentified epidemic' is a zombie virus that preserves martial arts skills
Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord have been fighting for 989 days despite the apocalypse
chapters.notes: The zombies are former martial arts masters who can use Qingong to fly. The Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord treat their zombified subordinates as still belonging to their respective factions.

events: Team flees from martial arts zombies jumping through the air
Death King throws Alchemist and Heavenly Demon to safety
Shiny's light stops the zombie horde
Heavenly Demon reveals the zombies are her former disciples
The two leaders have been at war for 989 days and refuse to stop
cause_effect: The war between Righteous and Demonic sects continued even after everyone turned to zombies
Both leaders maintain their honor by refusing to surrender or stop fighting
Death King realizes this world itself has no hope or dreams
chapters.notes: The Heavenly Demon is called So Baek-hyang. The Murim Lord is Bu Wol-sun of the Namgung family. They swear to fight until one defeats the other.

events: Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord's 'fight' is shown to be clumsy stick-fighting without aura
Bae Hu-ryeong explains their movements are actually master-level principles without energy
Medicine King cooks an incredible feast from his subspace inventory
Death King notices Murim Lord's body is warm despite freezing weather
Team stays in the cave with hot spring
cause_effect: The two leaders are physically weak despite being martial arts masters
Medicine King's cooking reveals he was a 3-Michelin star chef
Death King suspects something is wrong with their bodies (warmth without aura)
chapters.notes: The two leaders have been eating only energy seeds (Hwan) for over two years. Medicine King uses Bling H2O for cooking. The cave is their base.

events: Alchemist and Medicine King examine a zombie monk in a coffin
They discover acupuncture needles can block the zombie virus temporarily
Death King follows Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord at night
Discovers they are infected and use chi to block their spinal cords to prevent full zombification
They have been paralyzed but moving via chi control for three years
skills: Chi-based body control (Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord)
cause_effect: Both leaders were bitten three years ago and block the virus by sealing their cervical spinal cords with chi
This is why they are physically weak - moving their bodies manually with chi is exhausting
They refuse to stop fighting because they want to die by each other's hands, not by disease
chapters.notes: The Shaolin monk lasted a year after being bitten before turning. Most last only 15 days. The Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord have endured three years through extreme willpower.

events: Heavenly Demon tells story of invincible master killed by succubus - no one is invincible to happiness
Reveals they line up their zombified subordinates daily as a ritual
The 990th battle between Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord begins
Death King decides he must save this world properly, not just the two leaders
Murim Lord dies on the 10th day from the virus
deaths: Murim Lord (dies from zombie virus on day 10)
cause_effect: The world ends when both leaders die; until then, the world technically continues
Their daily ritual of lining up zombies maintains their sense of purpose and war
Murim Lord's chi finally runs out, leading to his death
chapters.notes: Death King realizes a 'good ending' must satisfy the characters, not just save them physically. The war has lasted 990 days. There are 500 zombies on each side.

events: Alchemist reveals her skills to Medicine King to gain his cooperation
Medicine King slaps her, then they form a tense working relationship
Count tries to sign exclusive contract with Alchemist
Heavenly Demon admits she is afraid of her chi running out
The team works around the clock on research
skills: Three other B-grade or higher skills (Alchemist)
cause_effect: Alchemist's openness about her skills builds trust with Medicine King
Heavenly Demon reveals her body parts will rot one by one as chi depletes
The blizzard prevents them from gathering lost zombies
chapters.notes: The Alchemist has four high-grade skills. Medicine King eventually acknowledges her superiority. Time is running out - only 2 days remain until destruction.

events: Murim Lord dies at dawn on day 10
Heavenly Demon goes mad with grief and enters 'disharmony' state
She kills Medicine King instantly with one sword strike
Venomous Snake dies after enduring only 3 strikes
Death King and Alchemist are cut down while fleeing
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (Heavenly Demon's true power revealed)
loops: Death King dies and regresses 24 hours
cause_effect: Heavenly Demon's madness is triggered by Murim Lord's death
She loses all sense of reality and attacks everyone as enemies
Her true strength is revealed - even Bae Hu-ryeong admits she'd win 6 out of 10 fights against him in his prime
chapters.notes: The Heavenly Demon's 'disharmony' state makes her incredibly powerful but completely insane. She mistakes everyone for righteous path enemies.

events: Death King copies Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (A+ rank) from Heavenly Demon after death
Heavenly Demon's trauma reveals she was abandoned by her mother in a snowfield as a child
Bae Hu-ryeong explains demonic arts as 'nails that scratch the world' vs righteous sect 'vessels that accept'
Death King commits 8 additional suicides to return to day 1 of the Apocalypse
Death King kneels before Heavenly Demon and asks to become her disciple
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (A+ rank, copied by Death King)
I Want To Become Just Like You
deaths: Death King (suicide by Holy Sword to see trauma)
Death King (8 additional suicides to reach day 1)
loops: Death King loops back 24 hours after first death
Death King loops back 8 more days through repeated suicide to reach day 1
cause_effect: Death King realizes curing the virus is only the first step - need a satisfying ending for both leaders
He chooses Infernal Heavens Demonic Art specifically to understand the Heavenly Demon
Going back to day 1 allows him to change the entire course of events
chapters.notes: The Infernal Heavens Demonic Art requires hatred and curses toward the world. Using it risks losing one's sense of self. Death King has now experienced Heavenly Demon's childhood trauma of abandonment.

events: Young So Baek-hyang's backstory: found buried in snow by Demonic Buddha
She has no memories of her name or past
Present: Death King demonstrates Infernal Heavens Demonic Art before Heavenly Demon
Heavenly Demon is shocked and demands to know where he learned it
Death King passes out from overusing the skill
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (demonstrated by Death King)
cause_effect: Death King's demonstration proves he has the qualification to inherit the demonic art
Heavenly Demon cannot understand how an outsider learned her sect's secret technique
The skill is fueled by grief and screams rather than traditional martial arts principles
chapters.notes: So Baek-hyang was given her name by the Demonic Buddha - it means 'scent of white snow.' She was the perfect vessel for demonic arts because she was born of ice and snow.

events: Young So Baek-hyang enters Demonic Cult at age 11
Realizes the 'paradise' is actually a jar of poison where orphans are raised for revenge
She works harder than others, helps farmers, makes her own clothes
At age 13, she passes the 'test of comfort' by Demonic Buddha
Present: Death King wakes up; Heavenly Demon accepts him as disciple but gives test
Test: Fight a zombie in a pit while feeling only hunger
cause_effect: So Baek-hyang's harsh upbringing shaped her worldview - the Demonic Cult exists to take revenge on the world
Death King's test requires him to wield sword from pure hunger, the first of nine techniques
Understanding starvation is necessary to cut down those who have never starved
chapters.notes: The nine techniques of Infernal Heavens Demonic Art correspond to deaths: starvation, dehydration, drowning, etc. Each represents a different form of suffering.
